--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local Q={"\052\067\043\108\080\116\074\068\077\087\072\066\054\087\077\083\088\101\061\061","\098\066\052\103\057\073\107\106";"\052\066\089\108";"\104\097\117\114\048\050\049\119";"\057\082\090\114\102\118\097\078\083\113\075\061";"\100\057\100\071\090\085\068\074\051\055\061\061";"\070\090\114\119\068\086\121\071\074\098\116\114\116\121\054\077\088\086\073\098\056\097\109\117\072\101\061\061";"\073\072\117\067","\054\097\108\118";"\098\047\066\074\056\101\061\061";"\101\105\068\108\114\057\050\055\100\057\070\079\081\052\076\105\099\057\056\061";"\079\047\082\100\102\105\117\057\047\118\066\108\107\104\099\061";"\122\082\075\074\071\111\073\056\088\119\061\061","\069\106\054\085\120\049\071\076\107\112\119\061";"\067\109\049\109\122\072\117\108\072\104\097\061";"\071\087\099\099\068\067\067\073\084\111\104\057\097\107\055\075","\116\099\118\103\118\119\078\083\105\114\103\082\070\077\114\102\084\107\057\067\101\086\106\054\103\122\100\071\097\097\061\061","\075\120\109\051","\087\099\089\078","\116\087\080\074\097\110\121\070\120\055\061\061";"\073\117\100\084\101\116\073\084\065\057\076\109\090\116\073\076","\071\083\087\071\089\108\047\075\109\052\090\086\078\078\079\102\051\080\075\111";"\068\110\089\083\065\102\057\104\117\072\081\116";"\104\106\090\118\099\104\048\072\089\097\061\061","\066\068\065\119\054\108\071\098","\056\107\121\086\054\085\068\052\112\048\090\079\109\051\100\077\084\119\061\061","\070\088\088\049\073\111\043\065\103\080\115\061","\115\117\107\107\065\119\061\061","\116\068\056\049\051\049\116\083\109\043\086\071\049\084\100\112\118\107\070\052\071\088\122\086\057\072\071\108\049\101\061\061","\086\084\098\116\100\105\085\116\072\069\112\056\053\108\056\119","\112\118\071\113\114\079\084\106\073\109\101\101\071\100\085\077\083\119\061\061","\073\111\051\100","\090\099\101\083\111\049\111\047\097\068\101\061","\076\055\089\050\076\065\053\113\066\051\048\106","\072\103\055\121\049\115\085\110\074\082\049\101\054\049\118\069","\103\077\119\082\10 \115\086\055\098\090\055\061\061","\089\097\075\047\110\106\101\118\051\098\068\069\054\051\051\061","\071\051\079\110\101\104\108\113","\053\106\076\109\120\101\061\061";"\056\054\049\065\080\072\112\051\098\119\061\061";"\082\080\056\121\087\057\088\119\110\098\100\068\120\055\061\061";"\070\082\116\074\117\073\053\049\085\097\061\061";"\100\075\102\103\048\055\061\061";"\052\073\066\053\078\070\057\070\073\083\102\043\049\085\043\103\104\076\052\107\120\097\061\061","\118\084\098\052\109\097\061\061","\050\067\053\115\076\047\055\079\070\074\056\112\050\119\061\061","\106\115\080\118\084\101\061\061";"\116\054\068\102\070\114\056\061","\085\049\072\110\090\082\104\081\054\053\117\122\114\049\053\112\053\066\117\086","\053\112\099\049";"\090\085\053\110\108\055\061\061";"\090\085\068\104\090\114\054\109\070\116\049\061","\080\083\098\112\065\048\090\108\115\105\050\108\115\099\050\077","\043\109\089\102\108\068\103\121\102\108\098\048\114\049\049\055\118\107\082\112\107\055\061\061","\097\087\087\110\110\119\061\061","\116\054\068\050\080\057\073\076\069\097\061\061";"\055\122\048\102\076\085\078\108\055\047\113\104\054\114\057\070\043\097\061\061","\106\102\047\102\090\119\121\107\121\106\090\070\107\080\080\118\054\048\056\061","\099\112\083\069\116\105\051\066\051\122\065\061";"\049\099\086\084";"\102\088\073\089\083\103\113\074";"\109\079\051\069","\070\082\053\104\075\075\079\110\117\055\061\061","\069\073\086\067";"\075\055\088\103\068\068\075\051\106\119\084\061";"\057\080\105\077\114\055\065\061";"\074\090\068\097\070\104\112\115\090\070\069\107\100\103\115\112\086\081\106\109\107\109\105\079\082\083\088\102\054\119\061\061","\082\097\065\073","\100\099\119\056\100\117\050\109\100\057\047\081\081\053\050\120","\080\122\080\065";"\118\053\108\066\116\101\061\061";"\101\117\068\102\080\083\072\081\070\116\053\054\070\114\047\071\070\099\043\076\069\116\098\086\108\114\047\084","\097\097\087\110\083\075\089\122\111\081\085\066\065\106\111\071";"\109\066\051\0 function K(K)return Q[K+(784188-773287)]end for K,z in ipairs({{-550858-(-550859);124914-124007},{-81274+81275;761982-761094},{703461+-702572;-28985+29892}})do while z[-810495+810496]<z[813418-813416]do local K=math.floor local z=table.concat local g=string.char local T=table.insert local c=Q local W=type local j=string.sub local x={C=-724090+724092;z=-382717+382721;T=517413+-517361,o=411914-411903,m=-9061-(-9095),["\048"]=921401-921398,W=612192-612133,["\052"]=578536+-578497;I=428200+-428183;["\050"]=694013+-693972;D=287896-287835;L=-815617+815654;N=277819-277806,h=-325012-(-325058);["\055"]=-593058-(-593106);A=433425-433397;E=-606298-(-606328);a=389214-389214;j=-889456+889518;k=711520-711487,F=241485-241460;["\057"]=-473761-(-473799);t=799110+-799087;["\054"]=202103-202050;R=-427974+427984;G=-234641-(-234676),l=-406318-(-406344),s=-1512+1536;["\047"]=713833+-713776;B=81195-81177,S=-999527-(-999582);d=-301559+301580,g=67513-67450;["\051"]=600343-600331;n=952512+-952461;O=900659-900616,c=858261+-858241,Y=879235+-879195,y=550748+-550706;["\049"]=892676+-892668,M=854373-854358,v=69399-69368,["\053"]=2622-2617;H=-411239+411248,x=-617906-(-617913),q=997205+-997156,K=534673+-534613,e=661662+-661646;P=724130-724103,X=-959524+959582;J=539577-539527,["\043"]=614577-614532;f=989114-989070,p=-937875-(-937889);["\056"]=691112-691056,Z=736792-736763;w=-656822+656854,r=-262414-(-262436);u=-1018281+1018335;U=560159-560153;b=732364+-732363;i=58937+-58901,V=-35124-(-35171),Q=-158771+158790}local F=string.len for Q=-600758-(-600759),#c,-692374+692375 do local M=c[Q]if W(M)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local W=F(M)local I={}local O=398185-398184 local p=-826488+826488 local V=192465-192465 j(M,O+(907444-907443),O+(-632831-(-632832)))~="\061"then T(I,g(K((p%(-850249+915785))/(179902+-179646))))end break end O=O+(183503+-183502)end c[Q]=z(I)end end end return(function(Q,g,T,c,W,j,x,X,y,p,b,L,B,l,D,F,z,O,V,M,r,e,I,i)O,I,r,B,z,X,F,e,V,y,M,D,b,L,i,p,l=-79345-(-79345),function()O=(-51261+51262)+O M[O]=784621+-784620 return O end,function(Q,K)local g=p(K)local T=function()return z(Q,{},K,g)end return T end,function(Q,K)local g=p(K)local T=function(T,c,W,j,x,F,M)return z(Q,{T,c;W;j;x,F;M},K,g)end return T end,function(z,T,c,W)local n,O,Qi,q,x,Z,S,V,Si,bi,Ii,C,li,o,Xi,f,m,w,a,R,ci,ji,xi,pi,Ai,Y,Gi,zi,Wi,ii,Vi,G,gi,Ki,v,J,fi,t,wi,Ti,Mi,X,P,M,u,ri,E,N,A,Oi,d,Bi,h,s,U,ei,p,oi,yi,H,Fi,Di,k,Li while z do if z<8574123-150881 then if
